description: country in Central and South Asia
description_wiki: Afghanistan, officially the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan, is a landlocked country located at the crossroads of Central and South Asia.

description: capital and the largest city of Afghanistan
description_wiki: Kabul is the capital and largest city of Afghanistan.

description: country in Eastern Europe and Northern Asia
description_wiki: Russia, or the Russian Federation, is a country in Eastern Europe and North Asia.

description: Arabic term for people engaged in jihad ("struggle")
description_wiki: Mujahideen or mujahidin (Arabic: مُجَاهِدِين, romanized: mujāhidīn), is the plural form of mujahid (Arabic: مُجَاهِد, romanized: mujāhid, lit. 'strugglers or strivers, doers of jihād'), an Arabic term that broadly refers to people who engage in jihad (lit. 'struggle or striving [for justice, right conduct, Godly rule, etc.]'), interpreted in a jurisprudence of Islam as the fight on behalf of God, religion or the community (ummah).

The Taliban, officially known as the Islamic Movement of Taliban, also referring to themselves by their state name, the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan, is an Afghan political and militant organization with an ideology comprising elements of the Deobandi movement of Islamic fundamentalism and Pashtun nationalism.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: combined military forces of the United States

aliases: Afghan National Defense and Security Forces
description: former military and security forces of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan
description_wiki: The Afghan National Security Forces (ANSF), also known as the Afghan National Defense and Security Forces (ANDSF), were the military and internal security forces of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan.
